## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows positive trends, with clicks and impressions increasing month-over-month](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [New content classification system proposed to improve analytics and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Ongoing efforts to refine AI fact-checking and product feature accuracy in content](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [API integration meeting to be scheduled between Yourco tech team and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=2105.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance

  - [Positive trends in clicks and impressions, with month-over-month growth](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Notable spike in performance on Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Upward trend in clicks despite AI's impact on search behavior](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Specific query "incident report template" showing increased impressions](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [All of this week's content ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Lean manufacturing article adapted to focus on multi-location implementation](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Internal linking strategy implemented to improve indexing of non-indexed pages](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [New content classification system proposed to better track performance and guide content creation](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Proposal includes main clusters (e.g., goals, pain points) and subclusters (e.g., features, value props)](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)

### AI and Product Accuracy

  - [Efforts to improve AI fact-checking and product feature accuracy in content](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Truncated version of help docs created for fact-checking schema](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Discussion on using Help Center articles to improve accuracy of feature descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [Suggestion to create blog posts about specific Yourco features for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)

### SEO and Analytics

  - [Scrunch dashboard set up for visibility sampling, awaiting data population](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Discussion on using sales call insights to inform SEO strategy and query targeting](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Emphasis on aligning content with actual customer questions and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)

### Content Workflow and Approval Process

  - [Updated Airtable setup for easier content review and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Clarification on how to use the new system for content approval and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessica to review proposed content classification system and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)

  - [Carrie to investigate the "incident report template" query performance](https://fathom.video/share/kPVdtimNHFxtxP6pUYFuwAFbyteSttUu?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
